title: LoweringObservation
description: A self-consistency finding emitted by core/lowering.py:validate_lowerings(). Per PFS9-LO1..LO4. The shape lifts validate_lowerings' single-record-type emission pattern to a schema-level commitment — parallel to how substrate-knowledge-fold-sketch-01 lifted Python docstring claims to KF1-KF5. severity is a closed enum at two values; code is an open non-empty string (validate_lowerings emits five stable codes today but is extension-safe for new codes without a schema amendment). target_id and message carry human-readable routing + explanation.

severity.description: Closed enum matching validate_lowerings' hard-coded severities across its emission sites. PFS9-LO2.

code.description: Short stable tag identifying the check that emitted this observation. Today's codes: 'lowering_id_duplicate', 'pending_lowering_has_records', 'annotation_attention_unknown', 'supersedes_unresolved', 'supersession_back_reference_missing'. Open string per PFS9-LO3 — new codes from future checks don't require a schema amendment. Code vocabulary closure deferred to PFS9 OQ5.

target_id.description: Lowering id (or other record id) this observation targets. PFS9-LO4.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the finding. No length constraint. PFS9-LO4.
